Add WoRMS taxonomy to predator and prey

Source: R/taxonomy.R
add_taxonomy.Rd

Left-joins scientific names and higher taxonomy (class, order, family, phylum) for both predators and prey using the bundled WoRMS lookup table (worms_lookup, built in data-raw/build_worms_lookup.R). Prey with aphia_id_prey = NA in non-empty stomachs are labelled "Unknown" so their weight is not silently lost downstream.

Usage

add_taxonomy(dat)

Arguments

dat

Tibble from drop_invalid().

Value

dat with added columns predator_scientific_name, predator_class, predator_order, predator_family, predator_phylum, and matching prey_* columns.
